- 优化应用界面，统一为更贴近 MIUI 的视觉风格
- 改进设置页和设置子页，让标题、卡片间距和列表样式更一致
- 增强悬浮底部导航栏，加入更清晰的阴影和模糊效果
- 改进对话框、关于页、媒体库和播放器设置的显示细节

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Refine the app interface with a more MIUI-like visual style
- Improve settings pages with more consistent titles, card spacing, and list styling
- Enhance the floating bottom navigation bar with clearer shadow and blur effects
- Polish dialog, about page, media library, and player settings details

</details>
